#+title: orgo project
#+filetags: :dev:project:

A browser for [[id:44444444-4444-4444-8444-444444444444][org-roam]] notes,
written in [[id:22222222-2222-4222-8222-222222222222][Go]].

* Goals

- follow =id:= links in the browser
- visualize the link graph
- tabbed reading, like k1LoW/mo

* Non-goals

- editing notes (Emacs does that)

* Scratch

A link to a node that does not exist: [[id:99999999-9999-4999-8999-999999999999][ghost note]].

An inline verbatim: ~orgo ~/org-roam~ and *bold* and /italic/ text.
